summary: The diff only shows a modification to project_state.json (a metadata/state tracking file). The actual required file — frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png — does not appear in the diff as an added or modified binary asset. REQ-16 requires saving the uploaded QR code image as a static asset at that specific path, but no such file addition is evidenced in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the user-uploaded payment QR code image as the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png, replacing any existing placeholder or previous version of that file.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added or modified image file at frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png. Only project_state.json was modified. The actual PNG asset replacement is not evidenced in the diff.
